default.$description: Main text; high-emphasis content on standard surfaces.

inverse.$description: Primary text on inverted backgrounds and surfaces.

ondark.$description: Fail‑safe contrast color when text must sit directly on dark surfaces across any mode.

onlight.$description: Fail‑safe contrast color when text must sit directly on light surfaces across any mode.

default.$description: Secondary text; supporting or less-emphasis content.

inverse.$description: Secondary text for use on inverted backgrounds.

primary.$description: Brand-colored text; highlights key labels or emphasis.

secondary.$description: Secondary brand text; softer branded emphasis.

negative-bold.$description: Prominent error surface (toasts, banners, critical states).

negative-subtle.$description: Subtle error surface for inline or low-emphasis states.

positive-subtle.$description: Subtle success surface for inline feedback.

warning-bold.$description: Prominent warning surface for high-attention risk.

warning-subtle.$description: Subtle warning surface for advisory notices.

info-subtle.$description: Subtle info surface for neutral guidance.

info-bold.$description: Prominent info surface for important notices.

negative.$description: Error/destructive borders for alerts and fields.
Error icons for alerts and validation.

positive.$description: Success icons for completion and pass states.

warning.$description: Warning icons for risks or blockers.

default.$description: Primary page background color.

inverse.$description: Inverted primary page background color.

default.$description: Secondary page background color. For sidebars and alternative page backgrounds.

inverse.$description: Inverted secondary page background color. For sidebars and alternative page backgrounds.

default.$description: Main surface; base layer for cards, containers, and components.

inverse.$description: Primary surface for use on inverted backgrounds.
Inverted second-level surface used to distinguish content from inverted surface colors.

default.$description: Second-level surface; groups content above primary surface.

primary.$description: Primary brand color for accent surfaces.

secondary.$description: Secondary brand color for accent surfaces.

default.$description: Third-level surface; nests content within secondary areas.

inverse.$description: Tertiary surface for use on inverted backgrounds.

primary.$description: Primary neutral utility surface when branded surface color isn’t desired.

secondary.$description: Secondary neutral utility surface for layering with neutral primary surface color.

tertiary.$description: Tertiary neutral utility surface for layering with neutral surface colors.

primary-inverse.$description: Inverted primary neutral utility surface when branded surface color isn’t desired.

secondary-inverse.$description: Inverse secondary neutral utility surface for layering with neutral primary inverse surface color.

tertiary-inverse.$description: Inverse tertiary neutral utility surface for layering with neutral inverse surface colors.

primary-inverse.$description: Inverse surface color for form inputs.

hover.$description: Surface color for form inputs on hover.

hover-inverse.$description: Inverse surface color for form inputs on hover.

darkest.$description: Strongest overlay & default scrim; blocks background for modals and alerts.

lightest.$description: Faint light overlay; subtle separation for lightweight overlays.

darker.$description: Heavy overlay; dims background for drawers and major overlays.

dark.$description: Medium dark overlay; softens background for panels and popovers.

lighter.$description: Soft light overlay; moderate dimming for temporary overlays.

light.$description: Medium light overlay; clear separation for tooltips and menus.

default.$description: Fourth-level surface; fine grouping or subtle layering.

inverse.$description: Quaternary surface for use on inverted backgrounds.

default.$description: Medium border; default separation or container edges.

inverse.$description: Primary border for use on inverted backgrounds.

default.$description: Subtle border; fine dividers or low-emphasis structure.

inverse.$description: Secondary border for use on inverted backgrounds.

default.$description: Strongest border; key outlines and structural separation.

inverse.$description: Tertiary border for use on inverted backgrounds.

primary.$description: Brand border; key accents and selected states.

secondary.$description: Secondary brand border; subtle accents or supporting emphasis.

default.$description: High-contrast focus border for interactive elements.

inverse.$description: Focus border for use on inverted backgrounds.

transparent.$description: Invisible border placeholder; prevents layout shift on state changes.

default.$description: Default input field border in resting state.

inverse.$description: Input border for use on inverted backgrounds.

primary.$description: Always neutral border; non-brand outlines for containers.

inverse.$description: Neutral border for use on inverted backgrounds.

default.$description: Main icon color; primary actions and high-emphasis glyphs.

inverse.$description: Primary icon for use on inverted backgrounds.

ondark.$description: Fail‑safe contrast color when icon must sit directly on dark surfaces across any mode.

onlight.$description: Fail‑safe contrast color when icon must sit directly on light surfaces across any mode.

default.$description: Secondary icon; lower-emphasis or supporting glyphs.

inverse.$description: Secondary icon for use on inverted backgrounds.

primary.$description: Brand icon; key actions and selected states.

secondary.$description: Secondary brand icon; subtle accent icons.
